texto: Too much reason limits man to the physical world and blinds his imagination to the greater things that may be. But too much faith blinds him from curing the human suffering in this world. Men with too much faith accept suffering
autor: they expect it and even seek it out.
explicacao: Citação de they expect it and even seek it out. sobre temas ligados a fe. “Too much reason limits man to the physical world and blinds his imagination to the greater things…” articula fe, john-kramer, blythe em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como blythe.
